title:
PROMPT 030: Burger / Food вЂ” Restaurant / Delivery
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1080Г—1080px (1:1)
DURATION: 3.5s | LOOP: No
SVG: Burger stack (14 paths: top bun rect-round, sesame seeds Г—4 small ovals, lettuce wavy path, tomato slice rect, cheese slice rect with melted corners, patty rect, bottom bun rect) вЂ” centered 540Г—540px, stacked vertically, total 180px tall

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #FFF7ED (warm cream)
Top bun fill: #D97706 (warm amber brown)
Top bun stroke: #92400E (dark brown, 2px)
Sesame seeds fill: #FEF3C7 (pale cream)
Lettuce fill: #16A34A (leaf green)
Tomato fill: #EF4444 (red)
Cheese fill: #FBBF24 (gold yellow)
Patty fill: #78350F (very dark brown)
Bottom bun fill: #B45309 (medium amber)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Burger stacked naturally. Each ingredient clearly visible in layers.
Slight "exploded" version builds вЂ” ingredients come from above and stack down.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (3.5s total):
0вЂ“0.2s: Bottom bun slides up from below (Y:+60px в†’ 0, ease-out spring).
0.2вЂ“0.45s: Patty drops from above (Y:-50px в†’ 0, slight squash on land: scaleY 0.9 в†’ 1.0, ease-out).
0.45вЂ“0.65s: Cheese drops (same drop + squash animation).
0.65вЂ“0.85s: Tomato drops.
0.85вЂ“1.05s: Lettuce drops (slight sway left-right after landing: rotate -3В°в†’ 3В°в†’ 0В°).
1.05вЂ“1.3s: Top bun drops last вЂ” biggest impact squash (scaleX 1.05, scaleY 0.88 в†’ 1.0 bounce).
1.3вЂ“1.7s: Whole burger scales 1.0 в†’ 1.06 в†’ 1.0 (presentation bounce).
1.7вЂ“2.2s: Steam path (wavy S-curve, 40px, from top of bun) draws upward then fades. Color: #D4D4D8 grey, 60% opacity.
2.2вЂ“3.5s: Hold. Burger has slight hover float (Y 0 в†’ -8px в†’ 0, ease-in-out, 1.3s).

EASING CURVES:
- Ingredient drop: ease-in (falling)
- Squash settle: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Burger bounce: ease-in-out
- Float: ease-in-out
